languages.text: ...я отдал команду солдатам, приказав любой ценой сдерживать вражеский натиск.
...I ordered my soldiers to hold off the enemy onslaught at any cost.
languages.original_text: ...я отдал команду солдатам, приказав любой ценой сдерживать вражеский натиск.

traits.locale_text: ...I ordered my soldiers to hold off the enemy onslaught at any cost.
...I ordered my soldiers to hold off the enemy onslaught at any cost.
...I ordered my soldiers to hold off the enemy onslaught at any cost.
...I ordered my soldiers to hold off the enemy onslaught at any cost.

languages.text: ... ordené a mis soldados que resistieran el asalto del enemigo a cualquier precio.
languages.original_text: ...I ordered my soldiers to hold off the enemy onslaught at any cost.

traits.locale_text: ... ordené a mis soldados que resistieran el asalto del enemigo a cualquier precio.

languages.text: ... j'ai ordonné à mes soldats de repousser l'assaut ennemi à tout prix.
languages.original_text: ...I ordered my soldiers to hold off the enemy onslaught at any cost.

traits.locale_text: ... j'ai ordonné à mes soldats de repousser l'assaut ennemi à tout prix.

languages.text: ……我命令士兵不惜一切代价，挡住敌军猛攻。
languages.original_text: ...I ordered my soldiers to hold off the enemy onslaught at any cost.

traits.locale_text: ……我命令士兵不惜一切代价，挡住敌军猛攻。

languages.text: ... ich befahl meinen Soldaten, den feindlichen Ansturm mit allen Mitteln abzuwehren.
languages.original_text: ...I ordered my soldiers to hold off the enemy onslaught at any cost.

traits.locale_text: ... ich befahl meinen Soldaten, den feindlichen Ansturm mit allen Mitteln abzuwehren.

languages.text: Askerlerime, ne pahasına olursa olsun düşman saldırısını durdurmalarını emrettim.
languages.original_text: ...I ordered my soldiers to hold off the enemy onslaught at any cost.

traits.locale_text: Askerlerime, ne pahasına olursa olsun düşman saldırısını durdurmalarını emrettim.

languages.text: ...敵の猛攻を、どんな犠牲を払っても食い止めるよう、兵士たちに命じた。
languages.original_text: ...I ordered my soldiers to hold off the enemy onslaught at any cost.

traits.locale_text: ...敵の猛攻を、どんな犠牲を払っても食い止めるよう、兵士たちに命じた。
